data.current_description: Lookup multiple IP addresses in a single request. Standard plans support up to 100 IPs, premium up to 1,000.
data.description_suggestion: Lookup multiple IP addresses in a single request to retrieve geolocation, threat intelligence, and network information for each IP. Standard plans support up to 100 IPs per request, premium plans up to 1,000. Accepts an array of IP addresses in the request body and returns an array of geolocation and threat intelligence results.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity about expected inputs (array format), outputs (array of results with same fields as single lookup), and what data is returned. Enhanced description specifies request format, response structure, and plan-specific limits to improve AI agent interpretability.
